steps.title: State the constraints
steps.content: Each pair $(x, y)$ must satisfy both $y < x$ and $x < 22$.

steps.title: Test each choice
steps.content:
Choices C and D: All $x$-values (23, 24, 25) exceed 22, violating $x < 22$. Eliminated.

Choice B: The first row $(19, 20)$ has $y = 20 > x = 19$, violating $y < x$. Eliminated.

Choice A: Check all rows:
  • $(19, 18)$: $18 < 19$ ✓ and $19 < 22$ ✓
  • $(20, 19)$: $19 < 20$ ✓ and $20 < 22$ ✓
  • $(21, 20)$: $20 < 21$ ✓ and $21 < 22$ ✓
All rows satisfy both constraints. That matches choice A — A is correct.
